message:
refactor(codegen): Add emitConst helpers to 9 more module files

Add emitConst/emitFmtConst helper functions to reduce verbose builder
block patterns:
- fractions_mod.zig: genFraction simplified
- decimal_mod.zig: genDecimal and all context/rounding functions
- copy_mod.zig: genCopy and genDeepcopy
- binascii_mod.zig: genHexlify and genUnhexlify
- _string_mod.zig: formatter functions
- http_mod.zig: genConn connection generator
- hashlib_mod.zig: genNew hash function
- dbm_mod.zig: genOpen, genError, genWhichdb
- getpass_mod.zig: already had helpers (verified)

Total: ~108 lines of boilerplate removed.
